vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn bao quát toàn cảnh
vocab.example: Once we reached the summit, we were greeted by a panoramic vista of the entire mountain range.

vocab.meaning: trải dài, mở rộng ra (thường nói về thành phố hoặc cánh đồng)
vocab.example: From the observation deck, the city seemed to sprawl out in every direction like a sea of lights.

vocab.meaning: điểm nhìn thuận lợi, vị trí đắc địa để quan sát
vocab.example: The rooftop terrace provided the perfect vantage point to watch the traditional firework display.
The valley was bathed in sunlight, making the greenery look incredibly vibrant and lush.

vocab.meaning: phong cảnh xanh tươi, mướt mắt
vocab.example: The train journey through the countryside offered glimpses of a truly verdant landscape.
The snow-capped peaks were perfectly mirrored on the surface of the still lake.

vocab.meaning: làn nước xanh ngắt, xanh trong
vocab.example: The contrast between the white sand and the azure waters was simply breathtaking.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp nguyên sơ, mộc mạc nhưng đầy ấn tượng
vocab.example: There is a certain stark beauty to the desert dunes when the shadows lengthen at dusk.

vocab.meaning: tầm nhìn không bị cản trở
vocab.example: We chose a balcony room to ensure we had an unobstructed view of the ocean.

vocab.meaning: một bữa tiệc cho đôi mắt (cảnh tượng cực đẹp)
vocab.example: The vibrant colors of the coral reef were a real feast for the eyes during our diving trip.
